title: Error Handling: Try, Except, Finally, and Custom Errors
content:
### Day 23: Error Handling: Try, Except, Finally, and Custom Errors

**Try/Except** catches errors gracefully instead of crashing.

**Structure:** try → except → else (no error) → finally (always runs)

**Custom Exceptions:** Create your own error classes for specific cases.
practiceQuestions: Write safe input function with error handling.
keyTakeaways: Try/Except catches errors gracefully instead of crashing.
